title: PASS FTMO Account with algo, whats next? Anyone knows?
author: ThebobostorePakistan
selftext:
I have passed the FTMO account with algo trading, now whats next? How much time it will take? Will they give me same account or new account? Whats the next steps. By the way i use SmartEdge EA for this account. They offer a month free trial so anyone can test, www.smartedgetrading.net 

Flying today 🤣🤪😂🦾🦾🦾

comments.author: Outside-Vegetable217
comments.body: You continue trading and make bank, and enjoy your split. Quick question did you create Algo yourself or buy it?

replies.author: YellowCroc999
replies.body: This is a dumb ass promotion or just a dumb guy. But there isn’t much brain activity going on nevertheless

replies.author: Outside-Vegetable217
replies.body: Didn't see the link in the post 😞

replies.author: YellowCroc999
replies.body: Happens to the best of us, don’t worry about it brother

replies.author: ThebobostorePakistan
replies.body: Yes, i posted the link, and it's not wrong if it works for me. I am not losing anything if i mentioned them when the reality is that i pass it with their help.

replies.author: ThebobostorePakistan
replies.body: I can't give you my login to see but can record a video for you. I am not selling you anything nor am  I asking you to invest with me. You wana try it go try it, you don't want to try something else. I just try to help because it works for me.

replies.author: Amberkhell
replies.body:
I used SmartEdge algo, you can find it on the below link. They offer a free 1 month trial.
